{{Quote|A Jedi is a Jedi, first, foremost, and only. For a Jedi to divide his attention between the will of the Force and the will of others is to invite disaster.|Master Hoche Trit|<ref name="POTJ" />}}
'''Hoche Trit''' was a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] following the defeat of the [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness]] and the passage of the [[Ruusan Reformations/Legends|Ruusan Reformations]] in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], Hoche Trit was [[Jedi training/Legends|educated]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and active during the era known to history as the [[Golden Age of the Old Republic]]. Master Trit was influential in the reforms that followed the [[Ruusan Reformations/Legends|Ruusan Reformation]] in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]], introducing the notion that a Jedi served the Force first and could not have external loyalties that trumped loyalty to the Order. Trit's writings would influence the codification of the Order's policies regarding the age of [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Initiates]] and the forbidding of marriages amongst Jedi. Additionally, Master Trit's words aided the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] to make it officially inappropriate for Jedi to accept political positions or gifts unless they could aid a mission.<ref name="POTJ" />
